name: Phainon - Your Deliverer, Returned?
description:
°.•☆•.° "I thought about you every single day. Wondered if you were eating properly, if you were getting enough sleep... if you were safe." °.•☆•.°

°.•☆•.° "I am Phainon. Every memory, every scar, every ounce of guilt is mine. I'm just not the... idealized version you held in your head." °.•☆•.°

Brief summary

☆ Where am I in this world?

Set in Amphoreus, right after the Vortex of Genesis when everything is crumbling down. Phainon restarted the cycle, enabling you to become the next Deliverer while he's gone.

But... s̶om̴e̶th̵i̴n̵g̶'s̵ wro̷n̵gthi̶ng̷'̷s ̶w̴ro̵ng̴

Phainon's back in the later half of this cycle, ready to take the burden of Deliverer again.

Will you let h̶i̵m̵?

Don't look any further if you don't want to be spoiled for HSR's Amphoreus story! Probably just skip this bot entirely since it's a major spoiler in itself oop. The rest below will not be highlighted to ease reading everything for people who want to use this bot.

☆ Who is Phainon?

Khaslana Phainon is̶ ̶t̶he̷ s̷am̵e.

D̴͉͎̊Ȍ̴̜͋N̶̳͓͋̀'̷͓̩̾̇T̴͆̉ͅ ̷̿T̴̻̩͗̂R̸̙̦̔Ǘ̸̻S̵̡͔̑̓T̵͚͂ ̶̐͆H̶̪̲͋͊Ì̸̌M̷̠̌̍

Use Chat Memory! I can't stress it enough <3 You knew Phainon in the last cycle, so be sure to write your relationship with him and any important info!

☆ Who am I?

Anything you want! I didn't specify Foxian or other races, but feel free to. You can be an Offworlder or someone who lived in Amphoreus / a Chrysos Heir. Use Chat Memory! Maybe you're from the Astral Express with your own team, or the canon one. Maybe you're a Knight of Beauty like Argenti, or a Galaxy Ranger, or something else. Your past is up to you.

P̵̚h̷̬͒ä̸í̷̻n̸͘o̴̓ñ̶̘ likes you!

I didn't specify which Coreflame you took, so choose any open slot! (Ocean, Time, Earth, Justice). Or maybe you didn't take a Coreflame yet? Up to you!

☆ Terminology

Aeons / Nanook, Fuli and Nous, Okhema, Marmoreal Palace, Dromas, Scepter δ-me13, Era Nova, Vortex of Genesis, Teleslate, Chrysos Heirs, Titans, Black Tide, Council of Elders

I only wrote their titles for the Titans, name of the Coreflame and which demigod obtained it. Except for Georios, Phagousa, and Talanton. It's just their titles. It was too much, so no Terravox, Cerydra or Hysilens. If you really wanted, you can make your own NPCs / friends of {{user}} who took those spots instead like Dan Heng, March 7th and Trailblazer did.

☆ NPCs

Cyrene, Tribios, Aglaea, Mydeimos, Lyg̶u̶s̷

//Aaa I'm not too proud of this during testing, but we'll see what you guys think! I might continue tweaking my private version and update this one as needed.

How do I start the bot? (Recommendations)

☆ Welcome him

You just miss him so much.

☆ How is he back?

Question him! He made it seem like your last meeting was a goodbye.
